name: (Set of 3) 12"x28" Floral Wall Art - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Enhance your home decor with this set of three delightful 12"x28" Floral Wall Art from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Each piece features a charming botanical offset print that adds a touch of nature to your walls. The assorted brown tones complement various color schemes, while the neutral palette ensures subtle elegance. Housed in a framed set, these vertical artworks are crafted from quality materials.

Threshold™ designed w/Studio Mcgee: Looks like home, feels like you.
